name: Time Tools
summary: Expose current time and timezone checks through time:// URI commands.
description: Time Tools is a minimal external urirun connector package. It declares time:// routes with a typed @handler, returns structured JSON, and can be projected to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Stamp task and flow execution with host-local or UTC time.
Verify that connector packages can be installed from GitHub and projected to MCP/A2A.
Use time:// in flows without coupling the flow to Python code.
